member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Cosmos DB Database Container.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The resource name.
The container name.
The hierarchical partition key paths.
The parent Azure Cosmos DB database resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The resource name.
The container name.
The partition key path.
The parent Azure Cosmos DB database resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.ContainerProperties
member.summary: Gets the container properties for this azure cosmos db container resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.ContainerName
member.summary: Gets or sets the container name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.PartitionKeyPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the partition key path.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.PartitionKeyPaths
member.summary: Gets or sets the hierarchical partition keys.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Cosmos DB database resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Cosmos DB Database Container.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Cosmos DB Database. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource)
member.summary: Represents an Azure Cosmos DB Database. Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource.DatabaseName
member.summary: Gets or sets the database name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource.Containers
member.summary: The containers for this database.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure Cosmos DB account resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure Cosmos DB database.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource)
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.CosmosApplicationName
member.summary: Defines the application name used to interact with the Azure Cosmos database. This will be suffixed to the Cosmos user-agent to include with every Azure Cosmos database service interaction.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.EmulatorAccountKey
member.summary: Gets the well-known and documented Azure Cosmos DB emulator account key. See

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.EnableServerlessCapability
member.summary: Gets the well-known and documented capability value used to enable serverless mode for Azure Cosmos DB accounts.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosUtils.ParseConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the connection string to extract the account endpoint and connection string.
member.remarks: The connection string can be in the following formats: A valid Uri AccountEndpoint={valid Uri} - optionally with [;Database={databaseName}[;Container={containerName}]] {valid CosmosDB ConnectionString} - optionally with [;Database={databaseName}[;Container={containerName}]]

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding Azure Cosmos DB resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.AddAzureCosmosDB(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Cosmos DB connection to the application model.
member.param: The .
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.RunAsEmulator(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Cosmos DB resource to be emulated using the Azure Cosmos DB emulator with the NoSQL API. This resource requires an to be added to the application model. For more information on the Azure Cosmos DB emulator, see .
member.param: The Azure Cosmos DB resource builder.
Callback that exposes underlying container used for emulation to allow for customization.
member.remarks: When using the Azure Cosmos DB emulator, the container requires a TLS/SSL certificate. For more information, see . This version of the package defaults to the tag of the / container image.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.RunAsPreviewEmulator(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Cosmos DB resource to be emulated using the Azure Cosmos DB Linux-based emulator (preview) with the NoSQL API. This resource requires an to be added to the application model. For more information on the Azure Cosmos DB emulator, see .
member.param: The Azure Cosmos DB resource builder.
Callback that exposes underlying container used for emulation to allow for customization.
member.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the / container image.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithDataVolume(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a named volume for the data folder to an Azure Cosmos DB emulator resource.
member.param: The builder for the .
The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithGatewayPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the gateway port for the Azure Cosmos DB emulator.
member.param: Builder for the Cosmos emulator container
Host port to bind to the emulator gateway port.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithPartitionCount(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource},System.Int32)
member.summary: Configures the partition count for the Azure Cosmos DB emulator.
member.param: Builder for the Cosmos emulator container
Desired partition count.
member.remarks: Not calling this method will result in the default of 10 partitions. The actual started partitions is always one more than specified. See this documentation about setting the partition count.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.AddDatabase(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a database to the associated Cosmos DB account resource.
member.param: AzureCosmosDB resource builder.
Name of database.
member.remarks: This method is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use instead.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.AddCosmosDatabase(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a database to the associated Cosmos DB account resource.
member.param: AzureCosmosDB resource builder.
The name of the database resource.
The name of the database. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.AddContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a container to the associated Cosmos DB database resource.
member.param: CosmosDBDatabase resource builder.
Name of container resource.
Partition key path for the container.
The name of the container. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.AddContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a container to the associated Cosmos DB database resource with hierarchical partition keys.
member.param: CosmosDBDatabase resource builder.
Name of container resource.
Hierarchical partition key paths for the container.
The name of the container. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithDefaultAzureSku(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource})
member.summary: Configures the Azure Cosmos DB resource to be deployed use the default SKU provided by Azure.
member.param: The builder for the Azure Cosmos DB resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithDataExplorer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the Azure Cosmos DB preview emulator to expose the Data Explorer endpoint.
member.param: Builder for the Cosmos emulator container
Optional host port to bind the Data Explorer to.
member.remarks: The Data Explorer is only available with .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication with Azure Cosmos DB.
member.param: The Azure Cosmos DB resource builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzureKeyVaultResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication with Azure Cosmos DB.
member.param: The Azure Cosmos DB resource builder.
The Azure Key Vault resource builder where the connection string used to connect to this AzureCosmosDBResource will be stored.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Cosmos DB.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Cosmos DB.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the "connectionString" reference from the secret outputs of the Azure Cosmos DB resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.ConnectionStringOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Cosmos DB resource.
This is used when Entra ID authentication is used. The connection string is an output of the bicep template.
member.remarks: The value is taken from the cosmos.properties.documentEndpoint bicep property and contains an endpoint.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.UseDefaultAzureSku
member.summary: Whether or not to use the default Azure Cosmos DB SKU. By default, this is set to false, and the Cosmos DB account is created as a serverless account. If true, it will use the default Azure Cosmos DB SKU, which is typically a provisioned throughput account.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.ConnectionStringSecretOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" secret reference from the key vault associated with this resource.
This is set when access key authentication is used. The connection string is stored in a secret in the Azure Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.PrimaryAccessKeySecretOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "primaryAccessKey" secret reference from the key vault associated with this resource.
This is set when access key authentication is used. The Access Key string is stored in a secret in the Azure Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.Id
member.summary: Gets the "id" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.UseAccessKeyAuthentication
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the resource uses access key authentication.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.IsEmulator
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Azure Cosmos DB resource is running in the local emulator.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.IsPreviewEmulator
member.summary: Is this instance running a preview emulator version?

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the account endpoint URI expression for the Cosmos DB account.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.AccountKey
member.summary: Gets the account key expression for the Cosmos DB account.
member.remarks: This is only available for emulator and access key authentication. For Entra ID authentication, this property will be null.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Cosmos DB resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder
member.summary: Parses and manages connection strings in the form: Key1=Value1;Key2=Value2;... Preserves the exact placement of empty segments and semicolons. It also preserves spaces and case in keys and values.
member.remarks: This connection string builder should be used when you need to maintain the exact format of a connection string while adding or removing keys and values. When only parsing/reading connection string it is recommended to use as it handles escaping too.

member.name: P:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.ConnectionString
member.summary: The current connection string, always up-to-date.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The connection string to parse.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new empty instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.TryParse(System.String,Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder@)
member.summary: Tries to parse the given connection string into a . Returns true if parsing succeeds, false otherwise.

member.name: P:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the value associated with the specified key (case-insensitive). Returns an empty string if the value is empty, and null if the key does not exist. Setting a value to null removes the key/value pair and its following semicolon.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the specified key and its following semicolon (if present) from the connection string. Returns true if the key was found and removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the value associated with the specified key (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.ToString
member.summary: Returns the connection string in the original order, preserving empty segments and semicolons.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDefaultAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a for code that can run in local development or deployed to Azure.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDevelopmentAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a optimized for local development by excluding credential types not applicable on developer machines.
